ICC Intervenes After Alex Carey Snicko Controversy in Ashes Test

Dec 18, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

ICC Takes Action After Alex Carey Snicko Controversy

The Alex Carey Snicko incident during the Ashes Test exposed flaws in cricket’s review technology, prompting ICC intervention to ensure fairness. The third umpire’s misjudgment, caused by operator error, forced the governing body to reinstate England’s review and address procedural shortcomings.
